title: ToastTotem
body:
# Toast?!
Yes! Now you can replace the boring totem of immortality with toast in your head like you're a toaster!

![Toast in the head](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/38bdf581129dd99b41733523ad81de1842cd17e8.png)

# Yummy!
Such a delicious toast! And who would want to play without him after all?
